objective: Define binding production and review criteria for the requested video.
acceptance_criteria: Video matches the user's objective and target platform.
Scene claims are source-backed or explicitly marked as assumptions.
Captions are readable, synchronized, and inside safe areas.
No paid, licensed, or external provider work is performed without approval.

hard_gates.rule: Final media must have approved rights or an explicit user waiver.
Voiceover, visuals, and captions must align with the timeline.
hard_gates.evidence_required: timeline sync plan and render QA

required_rules: Preserve stable scene ids after downstream work begins.
forbidden_rules: Do not copy reference execution or article text directly without approval.
provider_constraints: Paid generation and provider uploads require explicit approval.
rights_and_budget_constraints: Stop before paid APIs, licensed downloads, external generation, or voice cloning.

visual_constraints: Visual route must be manifest-backed or explicitly deferred.
source_or_claim_constraints: Claims must map to source ids or be softened.

revision_policy.waiver_policy: Only Director/user may waive hard gates; record the waiver in the run ledger.

notes: Template only; Director must update scene criteria and gates for the actual request.
